content.thinking:
Interesting - the session_status shows different numbers:
- Context: 37k/200k (19%)
- But the monitor script showed 61%

This might be because the monitor script calculates differently or uses a different measurement. Either way, both are below 85% so no automatic session switch is needed.

The context monitor is warning at 61%, but the actual session shows only 19%. The threshold for auto-switching is 85%, so we're fine for now. I should note this in my response.
